basic_details.job_title: KGBV Ghaziabad Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 26 Chowkidar, Cook and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Kasturba Gandhi Residential Girls School Ghaziabad
basic_details.short_information: Kasturba Gandhi Residential Girls School Ghaziabad (KGBV Ghaziabad) Various Teaching and Non-Teaching Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the District Basic Education Officer Ghaziabad. A total of 26 vacancies have been announced through the KGBV Ghaziabad Various Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026. Candidates not less than 30 years (for Principal) and as per government rules for other posts who have Post Graduation, B.Ed., Graduation, Intermediate, High School, or Class VIII qualification are eligible to apply for these Various Teaching and Non-Teachin

age_limit.age_details: Not less than 30 years for Principal.
age_limit.details: Principal: Not less than 30 years. Other Posts: Age relaxation will be as per government rules. (Specific details not provided in the extracted data).

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation, B.Ed., Graduation, Intermediate, High School, Class VIII
qualification.details: Principal: Trained Post Graduate + 4+ years teaching experience in classes 9-12; minimum age 30 years. PGT Hindi: M.A. Hindi + B.A. with Sanskrit or Shastri exam (Sampurnanand Sanskrit University). PGT English: Post Graduate in English + LT Diploma / B.Ed. preferred. PGT Mathematics: M.A./M.Sc. Mathematics or B.A./B.Sc. (Hons) with 3-year Mathematics course. PGT Biology: M.Sc. Botany / Zoology / Life Sciences / Agriculture + relevant B.Sc. combinations. PGT Chemistry: M.Sc. Chemistry / Biochemistry or relevant combinations. PGT Physics: M.Sc. Physics or relevant PG Diploma + B.Sc. PGT Computer Science: M.Tech/B.E./B.Tech (CS) / MCA / M.Sc. (CS) / DOEACC B/A level / PG Diploma in Computer Application. Lab Assistant: High School (Science) + Lab Technician Diploma OR Intermediate (Science). Office Superintendent: Intermediate + CCC certificate / Computer Diploma + typing speed (Hindi 25 wpm, English 30 wpm). Assistant Cook: Class 8th pass. Peon: Class 8th pass. Watchman: Class 8th pass.

salary_details.pay_scale: Not less than 30 years for Principal.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KGBV Ghaziabad Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for KGBV Ghaziabad Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application by registered post is 26th April 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in KGBV Ghaziabad Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 26 vacancies for various teaching and non-teaching posts announced by the District Basic Education Officer Ghaziabad.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for KGBV Ghaziabad Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications range from Class VIII pass to Post Graduation with B.Ed., depending on the specific post. Please refer to the detailed eligibility criteria for each post.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for KGBV Ghaziabad Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Principal post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Principal post is 30 years. Specific age relaxation details for other categories are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contract-based positions. Candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section on this page. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary structure for the posts?
faq.answer: The salary details for each post are not explicitly provided in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive salary information.
